caption: The video appears to be a news segment from News18 India, focusing on political developments in Bihar. The screen displays two figures standing on opposite sides of a balance scale, symbolizing a comparison or competition between them. On the left, an older man is labeled as "Mukhyamantri Nitesh Kumar," indicating he is the Chief Minister, with additional text noting his age (72 years) and tenure (9th time CM). On the right, a younger man is identified as "Purvi Digyeyi CM" (former Deputy CM), with his age mentioned as 34 years. The background features a building, possibly a government or official structure, under a spotlight, emphasizing its significance. The text at the top reads "Nitesh ko Tejswini ki 'Siddhi Dhamki'," suggesting a challenge or threat posed by Tejswini Yadav to Nitesh Kumar. The bottom ticker provides a quote from J.P. Nadda, stating that Nitesh's return is good news. The overall tone of the video suggests a discussion on the political dynamics and power struggle within the state of Bihar.
